history.notes: Stricter scoring R4. Fixed: broken bar chart, empty space, arrow nav, connection lines, sparse title, missing cons, chart tooltips, theme toggles
R5: Added SVG connection lines to architecture, era markers + decade nav to timeline, scroll-reveal animations, hover effects. Chart.js theme toggle still partially broken on comparison.

R6 eval: Stricter scoring exposed a11y gaps (all files scored 5). Rebuilt all 6 files: added skip-links, aria-labels, landmark roles, focus indicators, SVG icons replacing emojis, Chart.js destroy/rebuild on theme toggle, mobile breakpoints, scroll-reveal fix (visible by default). Updated SKILL.md with a11y section.

R7: 0 console errors. Responsive clamp() padding on slide decks, filter toolbar on comparison chart, animated connection lines + hover dimming on architecture, prefers-color-scheme detection on all 6 files. Best: ai-timeline 8.50. All scores ≥7.

R8: 0 console errors. Enhanced progress bars (4px + glow), added floating gradient orbs to slide deck backgrounds, confirmed count-up animations + hover states already present. Slide decks still weakest at 7.88. Need bigger changes to push past 9.0.

R9 RESEARCH ROUND: Researched CSS scroll-driven animations, @starting-style, container queries, :has(), color-mix(). Rebuilt all 6 files with: CSS prefers-color-scheme media query, enhanced entrance animations, better responsive breakpoints, Chart.js with hover tooltips, improved a11y. Reset loopsSinceResearch.
R10: 0 console errors on all 6 files.
R23: Evaluator inflated scores. Manual review shows ~5.5-6.5.
R24 RESEARCH ROUND: Complete rebuild inspired by Vercel/Apple/Stripe.
R25: Manual screenshot review (NOT auto-evaluator). Sub-agent scored 8.9 but real scores 4.0-6.5.
R26: Direct manual eval of 8 files. Best: system-architecture 7.0. Sub-agents failed to execute (0 tokens).

R27: Manual visual eval + targeted fixes. Sub-agent eval inflated to 8.1 (code-only, no browser). Real pre-fix avg 6.5. Fixes: era-specific colors on timeline, gradient text removed from carousel, grid pattern on slide decks, tighter spacing throughout, visible data points on charts. 0 console errors. Post-fix avg 6.7. Improvement: +0.6 from R26. Still below 7.0 threshold — design thinking gap remains.
